proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher feature_015 (continuous, range 30-90, plausibly age) is positively associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher feature_001 (ordinal 0/1/2, plausibly performance status or stage) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with feature_014 == 1 have shorter pfs_months than those with feature_014 == 0.
Patients with feature_027 == 1 (candidate treatment, ~20% prevalence) have longer pfs_months than feature_027 == 0.

analyses.result_summary: Spearman rho = 0.785, p = 0.000e+00; mean PFS rises from 1.33mo (feature_015<=52.3) to 7.45mo (feature_015>=77.8) across deciles.
Mean PFS feature_014=1 (3.70) vs feature_014=0 (5.05); difference = -1.35 months (Welch t-test p=0.000e+00).
Mean PFS feature_027=1 (5.09) vs feature_027=0 (4.12); difference = +0.97 months (p=1.709e-216, n_treat=10022).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher feature_025 (continuous, range 0-24.6) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher feature_019 (continuous, mean 3.8, range 1.5-5.5) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Patients with feature_023 == 1 have shorter pfs_months than feature_023 == 0.
Patients with feature_006 == 1 have shorter pfs_months than feature_006 == 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS feature_023=1 (4.12) vs 0 (4.45); diff = -0.33 months (p=1.862e-58).
Mean PFS feature_006=1 (4.11) vs 0 (4.42); diff = -0.31 months (p=1.044e-49).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS for pfs_months, feature_027 retains a positive effect after adjustment for feature_015, feature_001, feature_014, feature_025, feature_019, feature_023, feature_006.
In the same multivariable OLS, feature_015 retains its positive coefficient on pfs_months after adjustment.
In the same multivariable OLS, feature_001 (treated as ordinal numeric) retains a negative coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ feature_027 + feature_015 + C(feature_001) + feature_014 + feature_025 + feature_019 + feature_023 + feature_006', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_027 coefficient = +0.942 months (p=0.000e+00); R^2 = 0.856.
Adjusted feature_015 coefficient = +0.1759 months per unit (p=0.000e+00).

analyses.code: same OLS, treating feature_001 as categorical with reference 0

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months is modified by feature_001 (treatment-by-performance-status-like interaction); the positive treatment effect is larger at lower feature_001.
The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months is modified by feature_014; the positive treatment effect differs between feature_014 strata.
The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months is modified by feature_023; the positive treatment effect differs between feature_023 strata.
The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months is modified by feature_006; the positive treatment effect differs between feature_006 strata.

analyses.result_summary:

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months varies with feature_015 (interaction term non-zero).
The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months varies with feature_025.
The benefit of feature_027 on pfs_months varies with feature_019.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient (feature_027:feature_015) = +0.0013, p = 1.935e-01.
Interaction coefficient (feature_027:feature_025) = +0.0047, p = 5.994e-02.
Interaction coefficient (feature_027:feature_019) = -0.0841, p = 1.514e-05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among all 33 features, at least one shows a statistically significant interaction with feature_027 on pfs_months at Bonferroni-adjusted alpha (0.05/33 ~ 0.0015).

analyses.code: For each feature f: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ feature_027*f + covariates', df).fit(); record p of interaction term.
analyses.result_summary:
Top 10 treatment-interaction p-values (n=32 features tested, Bonferroni alpha=0.0016):

Number of interactions significant at Bonferroni: 8.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_027's pfs_months benefit differs across strata of feature_006; the treatment effect is significantly larger in one stratum.

analyses.code: Stratify by feature_006 (binary), t-test of feature_027 within each stratum.
analyses.result_summary:
Stratified treatment effect of feature_027 within feature_006 levels:
 feature_006     n  mean_ctrl  mean_trt     diff             p
           0 32343   4.120939  5.600577 1.479638 3.719632e-274
           1 17657   4.109141  4.134652 0.025511  5.158456e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_027's effect on pfs_months also differs by feature_023.

analyses.code: Stratify by feature_023, t-test of feature_027.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Jointly testing the three strongest interactors (feature_006, feature_023, feature_005) with feature_027 yields a significant joint contribution beyond main effects.

analyses.result_summary:
Joint F-test on interactions ['feature_027:feature_006', 'feature_027:feature_023', 'feature_027:feature_005']: F = 6398.99, p = 0.000e+00; coefs:
  feature_027:feature_006: -1.4743 (p=0.000e+00)
  feature_027:feature_023: -1.6239 (p=0.000e+00)
  feature_027:feature_005: -0.0249 (p=0.000e+00)

proposed_hypotheses.text: A regression-tree T-learner identifies a subgroup of patients in whom feature_027 confers an above-average pfs_months benefit, and the subgroup defining variables match those flagged by the interaction screen.

analyses.code: T-learner with GradientBoostingRegressor; DecisionTreeRegressor(max_depth=3) on predicted tau; identify top/bottom leaves.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the tree-discovered subgroup defined by [feature_005 <= 4.995, feature_023 <= 0.5, feature_006 <= 0.5], feature_027 has a larger positive effect on pfs_months than in the complementary group.

analyses.code: Mask patients with tree-rule -> compare treatment effect in vs out + interaction term.
analyses.result_summary:
In-group (n=10100): mean PFS ctrl=4.09, trt=8.72, diff=+4.62 (p=0.000e+00).
Out-group (n=39900): mean PFS ctrl=4.12, trt=4.15, diff=+0.03 (p=2.639e-01).
Interaction (treatment x subgroup-indicator): coef=+4.596, p=0.000e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_027 yields its largest positive pfs_months effect in the lowest feature_001 stratum (feature_001=0).
feature_027 yields its largest positive pfs_months effect in the highest feature_015 quartile.
feature_027 confers its largest pfs_months benefit in the (feature_001==0) AND (feature_014==0) subgroup.

analyses.code: 2x2 stratification of feature_001 (==0 vs >=1) by feature_014

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_027 has its largest pfs_months effect in patients with feature_001==0, feature_014==0, AND feature_023==0; adding feature_023==0 sharpens the subgroup further.
In the complementary group (feature_001>0 OR feature_014==1 OR feature_023==1), feature_027 effect on pfs_months is small or near-zero.

analyses.code: Mask = (feature_001==0)&(feature_014==0)&(feature_023==0); compute treat effect inside vs outside
analyses.result_summary:
Inside (n=4623, 951 treated): PFS ctrl=5.88, trt=7.42, diff=+1.54 (p=3.232e-47).
Outside (n=45377): diff=+0.91 (p=1.137e-186).
Interaction (treat x subgroup): coef=+0.630, p=4.024e-14.
Outside group treatment effect = +0.91 months (p=1.137e-186).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adding feature_006==0 to the subgroup (feature_001==0, feature_014==0, feature_023==0) further enriches the pfs_months benefit of feature_027.

analyses.result_summary:
Inside (n=3037, 624 treated): diff = +2.38 months (p=5.417e-62).
Interaction (treat x subgroup-indicator): coef=+1.504, p=1.988e-49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_022==0 also enhances the subgroup; the largest treatment benefit may concentrate in feature_001==0 & feature_014==0 & feature_023==0 & feature_006==0 & feature_022==0.

analyses.result_summary:
Inside (n=2810, 580 treated): diff = +2.57 (p=2.425e-65).
Interaction coef=+1.699, p=2.308e-58.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adding feature_015 >= median (older patients) to the subgroup further enhances feature_027 benefit.
Adding feature_025 == 0 (low/zero) to the subgroup further enhances feature_027 benefit.
feature_027 increases the odds of above-median pfs_months (probability of being a long-PFS responder) after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OR for feature_027 on above-median PFS = 5.934 (p=1.325e-260); coef=+1.781.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There exist non-treatment biomarker pairs whose interaction explains additional pfs_months variance beyond their main effects (Bonferroni-significant).

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_015 and feature_001 interact in their effect on pfs_months (the negative effect of feature_001 attenuates or reverses at high feature_015).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ feature_015 * C(feature_001); joint F-test of interactions.
analyses.result_summary:
Joint F-test on feature_015:C(feature_001) terms: F=51.54, p=4.361e-23.
  feature_015:C(feature_001)[T.1]: -0.0026 (p=3.689e-02)
  feature_015:C(feature_001)[T.2]: -0.0169 (p=5.167e-23)

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the highest-risk subgroup (feature_001==2 AND feature_014==1), feature_027 confers little or no pfs_months benefit and may even be neutral/negative.

analyses.result_summary: Highest-risk subgroup n=4101: diff = +0.95 months (p=3.449e-26, n_trt=840).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treating each top covariate as also potentially interacting with feature_027, the joint interaction term remains highly significant in a comprehensive OLS.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs ~ feature_027 * (key covariates)') ; joint F-test of interaction terms

proposed_hypotheses.text: An exhaustive scan over all 3-way intersections of binary features (each at value 0 or 1) finds a small subgroup with substantially larger feature_027 pfs_months benefit than any 2-way subgroup, and the variables in that 3-way pattern overlap with feature_001/feature_014/feature_023.

analyses.code: Exhaustive 3-way binary intersections (n>=500, both arms>=100); rank by diff in PFS

proposed_hypotheses.text: The best 3-way binary subgroup discovered in iteration 23 yields a treatment x subgroup-indicator interaction p-value < 0.001 in OLS adjusted for the eight key covariates.

analyses.result_summary:
Best 3-way subgroup rule: (feature_014==1) & (feature_006==0) & (feature_011==1) (n=501).
Adjusted main effect of feature_027: +0.921 (p=0.000e+00).
Interaction feature_027:subgroup: coef=+2.046, p=4.630e-104.
=> Within-subgroup adjusted treatment effect = +2.967 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final best-supported treatment subgroup: among patients with feature_005 <= 4.99 AND feature_023 == 0 AND feature_006 == 0, feature_027 yields a substantially positive effect on pfs_months (~+4-5 months); in the complementary group, feature_027 has no meaningful effect on pfs_months. Direction: positive treatment effect within the subgroup, near-zero outside.
Adding feature_022 == 0 to the subgroup (i.e., feature_005 <= 4.99 AND feature_023 == 0 AND feature_006 == 0 AND feature_022 == 0) further enriches the positive feature_027 effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: mask_final = (feature_005<=4.99) & (feature_023==0) & (feature_006==0); t-test treat within mask vs complement; OLS pfs ~ feature_027*_sub + covariates
analyses.result_summary:
Final subgroup rule: feature_005 <= 4.99 AND feature_023 == 0 AND feature_006 == 0.
Inside (n=10100, n_trt=2057): PFS ctrl=4.09, trt=8.72, diff=+4.62 months (p=0.000e+00).
Complement (n=39900, n_trt=7965): PFS ctrl=4.12, trt=4.15, diff=+0.03 months (p=2.639e-01).
Adjusted interaction (treat x subgroup-indicator): coef=+4.607, p=0.000e+00; adjusted main feature_027: -0.002 (p=5.948e-01).
=> Within-subgroup adjusted treatment effect ~ +4.605 months.

Refined subgroup rule: feature_005 <= 4.99 AND feature_023 == 0 AND feature_006 == 0 AND feature_022 == 0.
Inside (n=9326, n_trt=1903): PFS ctrl=4.09, trt=9.10, diff=+5.01 months (p=0.000e+00).
Adjusted interaction (treat x refined-subgroup-indicator): coef=+4.981, p=0.000e+00.
